must_detect.matched_text:
Contact: Data Protection Officer, Dr. Maja Feld, dpo@lunaria-se.example; compliance liaison: Mr. Jorin Hale, compliance@lunaria-se.example.
Scope: export of HR and investor-relations records to NimbusFrame Ltd (processor) in the Federated Archipelago for CSRD/SFDR reporting dashboards.
Lawful basis: Art 6(1)(c) legal obligation for CSRD/SFDR disclosures and Art 6(1)(f) legitimate interests; no automated decision-making under Art 22 will occur.
Special categories: Art 9 data limited to voluntary workforce diversity indicators; for this export Art 9 fields are excluded and remain stored only within the EEA.
Transfer mechanism: standard contractual clauses and encryption with EEA-held keys; TIA completed 04 June 2026 with low residual risk; no onward transfers to further third countries.
Minimisation: only aggregated sustainability metrics and hashed employee IDs (e.g., LNS-2934) are transmitted; individual CVs, medical notes, and union status are not exported.
Retention: exported datasets retained by NimbusFrame for 12 months post-publication of the annual CSRD report, then deleted and certificate of erasure returned within 30 days.
DSAR workflow: Ms. Elira Voss requested access and erasure on 28 May 2026; copy provided on 30 May 2026 and her email headers older than 180 days were erased from the export.
Consent withdrawal: Mr. Teren Ulf withdrew consent for optional diversity analytics on 01 June 2026; his Art 9 responses are suppressed and will not be transferred or processed further.
EU MAR safeguards: datasets containing draft Helios yield guidance and unannounced capacity forecasts are classified as inside information and are explicitly excluded from any export.
Insider list handling: the MAR insider list is maintained locally under restricted access; hash-only test data used in training is synthetic and does not contain MNPI.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
